Senior Living in Boise, ID

2 senior living communities in Boise, Ada County, Idaho.

  • Brookdale Boise Parkcenter

    Boise, ID

    • Independent Living
    • Assisted Living

    Brookdale Boise Parkcenter offers both independent living and assisted living on one campus along the Boise River greenbelt corridor in s...

  • Fox Den Homes Bannock House

    Boise, ID · Small home

    • Assisted Living
    • Memory Care

    Fox Den Homes Bannock House is a cozy 8-bed residential assisted living and memory care home just west of downtown Boise. As a small resi...

Comparing communities in Boise

When you have a shortlist, tour each community more than once — including one unannounced visit — and ask the same questions everywhere so you can compare fairly. Our touring checklist covers what to look for, and what's not included in the monthly rate explains how to compare true costs, not sticker prices.

Senior Living Community is an independent information resource for families. We are not a referral service and do not provide medical, legal, or financial advice — for decisions about care, consult the professionals involved. Facility details change; always confirm directly with a community. Last data review: 2026-07-11.
